posts.author: Mina
posts.body: Shipped the new focus-visible outlines across the log views. Keyboard users get a consistent ring on every card now. ⌨️

posts.author: Kai
posts.body: Reminder: this feed is demo-only. No customer data, no production APIs — just a place to celebrate the small wins.

posts.author: Ari
posts.body: Release v1.3.0 is out and linked to its decisions in the release log. Nice to have the reasoning travel with the work.
